name: Privilege Escalation Detected
description: Immediate alert on any privilege escalation or sudo usage to admin/root
query:
// Privilege Escalation Detection
// User gaining elevated privileges
events from authentication
where event_type = "privilege_escalation"
  or (event_type = "sudo_success" and target_user = "root")
group by username, hostname
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
